title: VLAND Rear Lights for Mini Cooper F55 F56 F57 2014-2021 Union Jack Tail Lights Assembly with Dynamic Signal,None Fog Light (Black-Smoked)
features: 🚗【Fitment】VLAND LED Tail Lights Compatible for Mini Cooper F55 F56 F57 2014-2021 Rear lights customized according to the original car, perfectly fit your car.

🚗【Function】Running light: LED (red);Turn Light: LED (Yellow) with Sequential indicator ; Brake light: LED (red);Reverse light: LED (white) ; Fog light: None; Note: Sequential Turn Function can be remove.

🚗【Feature】The lights have a row of amber LED which can set up to run as switchback or solid signals according to your preference. Ultra-modern fiber optic style Meanwhile, our headlights pass the IP67 test, waterproof and dust-proof provide protection for your long-term use.
🚗【Included】1 set of Tail lights (driver and passenger sides);Include product description(English version);
🚗【Installation】Plug & Play, No need to decode;direct bolt-on OE mounting or stock unit replacement; typically 1+ hours of installation; Professional installation is highly recommended.
description: Product Description VLAND Rear Lights for Mini Cooper F55 F56 F57 2014-2021 Union Jack Tail Lights Why Choose Us? We are a Chinese manufacturer dedicated to car headlights and taillight modification from 1987. VLAND have decades of experience and are exported to around 30 countries all over the world. We are a high-tech enterprise integrating industry and trade. NOTE As these are imported products, dirt, injury and damage to the box may occur during transportation, but this does not affect the functions. Plug-N-Play Operation, Direct Bolt-On OE Fitment or Replacement for the Stock Unit.. If you don’t want to use the sequential turn function,Do not connect the wiring harness in the picture. FITMENT Applicable Models Mini Cooper 3rd-gen. phase-I 3-Door (F56) (2014-2017)(2018-)；Mini Cooper 3rd-gen. phase-I 5-Door (F55) (2014-2017) (2018-)；Mini Cooper 3rd-gen. phase-I Convertible (F57) (2016-2017)(2018-)；Mini Cooper SE 3-Door (Electric) (2020-) Mini One 3rd-gen. phase-I 3-Door (F56) (2014-2017)(2018-)；Mini One 3rd-gen. phase-I 5-Door (F55) (2015-2017)(2018-)；Mini One 3rd-gen. phase-I Convertible (F57) (2016-2017) (2018-) Non-Adapted Versions : R-series;MINI Countryman F60 What’s in the Package? 1 set of Tail Lights (Driver and Passenger Sides) Adapter cable*1; Manual*1 Installation Easy installation: Plug-n-playD Direct bolt-on OE fitment or replacement for the stock unit Professional Installation is Highly Recommended Before&After The high brightness of the reversing light gives you a clear view even when reversing at night Update the appearance of your vehicle by improving your visibility; Driving at night attracts people's attention. Better lighting effect, wider range, safer driving. Prevent tailgating, avoid accidents and improve driving safety IP67 Waterproof & Shockproof & Patent Design ABS resin has excellent durability and surface beauty. Professional housing design with heat sink at the back of the lamp ensures LED not over heated and have longer life span. With reverse polarity protection and open circuit protection, waterproof and shock resistant. About VLAND VLAND is the manufacturer specializing in the development and production of modified car lamps. Focused on product improvement and superiority. We develop aftermarket car headlights and taillights to entertain people in the world of modification.
